title: Arrange livestock purchases
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Arrange livestock purchases demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify purchasing opportunities

pcs.text: Identify and confirm number, type and breed of livestock to be purchased
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and confirm number, type and breed of livestock to be purchased?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and confirm number, type and breed of livestock to be purchased.

pcs.text: Research and review livestock agents and sellers to determine appropriate sources of livestock
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research and review livestock agents and sellers to determine appropriate sources of livestock?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research and review livestock agents and sellers to determine appropriate sources of livestock.

pcs.text: Monitor and identify sales schedules for livestock types
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor and identify sales schedules for livestock types?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor and identify sales schedules for livestock types.

pcs.text: Research and evaluate purchasing prices to identify comparative values between sellers and agents
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research and evaluate purchasing prices to identify comparative values between sellers and agents?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research and evaluate purchasing prices to identify comparative values between sellers and agents.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Identify purchasing opportunities

elements.title: Inspect livestock condition

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check health status of livestock?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check health status of livestock.

pcs.text: Obtain and verify records and documents relating to livestock history
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain and verify records and documents relating to livestock history?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain and verify records and documents relating to livestock history.

pcs.text: Assess suitability of livestock for purchasing
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess suitability of livestock for purchasing?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess suitability of livestock for purchasing.

pcs.text: Assess prices against livestock condition and workplace requirements to identify appropriate purchasing values
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess prices against livestock condition and workplace requirements to identify appropriate purchasing values?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess prices against livestock condition and workplace requirements to identify appropriate purchasing values.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Inspect livestock condition

elements.title: Complete documentation

pcs.text: Source and complete insurance requirements for livestock
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Source and complete insurance requirements for livestock?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Source and complete insurance requirements for livestock.

pcs.text: Confirm purchases at current market price levels according to estimated livestock values
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm purchases at current market price levels according to estimated livestock values?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm purchases at current market price levels according to estimated livestock values.

pcs.text: Complete livestock purchase documentation and exchange with seller
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete livestock purchase documentation and exchange with seller?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete livestock purchase documentation and exchange with seller.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Complete documentation

elements.title: Organise transportation

pcs.text: Identify and engage carriers appropriate to livestock type and quantity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and engage carriers appropriate to livestock type and quantity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and engage carriers appropriate to livestock type and quantity.

pcs.text: Identify hazards and assess risks associated with livestock handling and transport, and implement control measures to manage risks according to workplace health and safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and assess risks associated with livestock handling and transport, and implement control measures to manage risks according to workplace health and safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and assess risks associated with livestock handling and transport, and implement control measures to manage risks according to workplace health and safety procedures.

pcs.text: Arrange timing and dates of transportation and delivery with transporter, vendors and agents
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Arrange timing and dates of transportation and delivery with transporter, vendors and agents?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Arrange timing and dates of transportation and delivery with transporter, vendors and agents.

pcs.text: Assess special needs of livestock and prepare facilities to ensure timely pick-up
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess special needs of livestock and prepare facilities to ensure timely pick-up?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess special needs of livestock and prepare facilities to ensure timely pick-up.

pcs.text: Undertake animal health and welfare checks on arrival according to workplace and legislative requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake animal health and welfare checks on arrival according to workplace and legislative requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake animal health and welfare checks on arrival according to workplace and legislative requirements.

pcs.text: Isolate livestock where required according to workplace biosecurity procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Isolate livestock where required according to workplace biosecurity procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Isolate livestock where required according to workplace biosecurity procedures.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete livestock movement records?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete livestock movement records.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Organise transportation
